name: Beer Cheese Bread
recipeIngredient: 4 Ounce Jack Cheese or any other cheese (cut into 1/4-inch cubes)
recipeInstructions:
1. Warm the beer and American cheese over low heat on top of the stove or in a microwave.
2. Stir until the cheese is melted but not completely smooth.
3. Add all ingredients listed, ensuring to select white bread and push start.
